AsistenciasPage.title: Digital Report - Attendance
AsistenciasPage.description: Platform for tracking attendance of Sacde crews.

CuadrillasPage.title: Crew Management
CuadrillasPage.description: Add, view, and manage Sacde crews.

EmpleadosPage.title: Employee Management
EmpleadosPage.description: Add, view, and manage Sacde employees.

ObrasPage.title: Project Management
ObrasPage.description: Add, view, and manage Sacde projects.

PartesDiariosPage.title: Daily Reports - Labor
PartesDiariosPage.description: Record the hours worked by the personnel of each crew.

PermisosPage.title: Permission Management
PermisosPage.description: Upload, view, and manage Sacde employee permissions.

AttendanceTracker.cardDescription: Select a date and manage the crews for the daily report.
AttendanceTracker.noCrewsForDay: No crews assigned for this day.
AttendanceTracker.noCrewsWithFilter: No crews found with the applied filter.
AttendanceTracker.newRequestDialogDescription: Select the project, then the crew, and finally assign a responsible person.
AttendanceTracker.searchEmployeePlaceholder: Search by name, file number, or CUIL...
AttendanceTracker.cloneDialogTitle: Clone list from the previous day?
AttendanceTracker.cloneDialogDescription: This action will replace today's crew list ({date}) with the list of crews and responsible persons from the previous day. All attendance statuses will be reset to "not sent". Do you want to continue?
AttendanceTracker.deleteDialogDescription: This action cannot be undone. It will permanently delete the request for the crew "{crewName}" in charge of "{responsibleName}".

toast.addRequestValidationError: You must select a project, a crew, and a responsible person.
toast.requestCreatedDescription: The crew has been added to the day's report.
toast.requestDeletedDescription: The attendance request has been successfully deleted.
toast.dayClonedDescription: The list of crews and responsible persons from the previous day has been cloned. All statuses have been reset to 'not sent'.
toast.cloneErrorDescription: Could not clone the previous day. Data may not be available.

CrewsManager.cardDescription: Search, filter by project, or manage existing crews.
CrewsManager.noCrewsWithFilter: No crews found with the applied filters.
CrewsManager.addCrewDialogDescription: Complete the crew details and assign the necessary personnel.
CrewsManager.searchEmployeePlaceholder: Search by name, file number, or CUIL...
CrewsManager.searchPersonnelPlaceholder: Search by name, last name, file number, or CUIL...
CrewsManager.deleteDialogDescription: This action cannot be undone. It will permanently delete the crew "{crewName}". You cannot delete a crew if it has associated attendance records.

toast.validationErrorDescription: You must complete all fields to create a crew.
toast.crewDeletedDescription: The crew "{crewName}" has been successfully deleted.

CrewsManager.phaseDateValidation: End date cannot be earlier than start date.

DailyLaborReport.cardDescription: Select date, project, and crew to record personnel hours or absences.
DailyLaborReport.alertNotifiedDescription: This report was notified on {date}. No further changes are allowed.
DailyLaborReport.warningAbsenceConflict: The employee has hours and an absence recorded on the same day.
DailyLaborReport.warningOvertime: The employee has a total of {hours} hours on this day, exceeding the limit of 12.
DailyLaborReport.noPersonnelAssigned: This crew has no personnel assigned.
DailyLaborReport.selectProjectAndCrewMessage: Select a project and a crew to see the personnel.
DailyLaborReport.addManualEmployeeDialogDescription: Select an employee to add to this daily report. It will only be saved when you press "Save Report".
DailyLaborReport.searchEmployeeByNamePlaceholder: Search by name or file number...
DailyLaborReport.moveEmployeeDialogDescription: Move {name} to another crew for the date {date}. This action will remove the employee from the current report and create a blank entry in the destination report.
DailyLaborReport.noOtherCrewsAvailable: No other crews available to move to.
DailyLaborReport.notifyDialogTitle: Notify and close the daily report?
DailyLaborReport.notifyDialogDescription: This action is irreversible. Once notified, the daily report for the crew {crewName} on the date {date} cannot be modified. Make sure all data is correct.

toast.selectionRequiredDescription: Please select a date and a crew to save.
toast.dataSavedDescription: Hours and absences have been recorded correctly.
toast.reportNotifiedDescription: The daily report has been notified and can no longer be modified.
toast.selectCrewToNotify: You must select a crew with personnel to notify.
toast.missingEntriesDescription: The following employees do not have hours or absences recorded: {employees}.
toast.phaseRequiredDescription: The following employees with hours do not have a phase assigned: {employees}.

EmployeesManager.cardDescription: Search, edit, add new employees, or export the list.
EmployeesManager.noEmployeesWithFilter: No employees found with the applied filters.
EmployeesManager.addEmployeeDialogDescription: Complete the required fields (*) to register a new employee.
EmployeesManager.deleteDialogDescription: This action cannot be undone. It will permanently delete the employee "{name}".

toast.validationErrorDescription: You must complete all required fields (*).
toast.legajoValidationError: The file number must only contain numbers.
toast.employeeDeletedDescription: The employee has been successfully deleted.
toast.exportSuccessDescription: The employee list has been downloaded.
toast.exportErrorDescription: Could not generate the Excel file.

ObrasManager.cardDescription: Here you can view all existing projects, add new ones, or delete them.
ObrasManager.deleteDialogDescription: This action cannot be undone. It will permanently delete the project "{name}". This action will fail if the project has assigned crews or employees.

toast.validationErrorDescription: The project name and identifier cannot be empty.
toast.projectDeletedDescription: The project "{name}" has been successfully deleted.

PermissionsManager.cardDescription: Filter, view, and add new permissions for employees.
PermissionsManager.noPermissionsWithFilter: No permissions found with the applied filters.
PermissionsManager.addPermissionDialogDescription: Complete the information to register a new permission.

toast.validationErrorDescription: You must complete all required fields: Employee, From, To, and Status.
toast.dateValidationError: The 'To' date cannot be earlier than the 'From' date.
toast.permissionAddedDescription: The permission for the employee has been successfully registered.

AbsenceTypesManager.cardDescription: Manage the absence reasons that can be recorded in daily reports.
AbsenceTypesManager.deleteDialogDescription: This action cannot be undone. It will permanently delete the absence type "{name}". This action will fail if the type is in use.

toast.validationErrorDescription: The type name and code cannot be empty.
toast.typeDeletedDescription: The type "{name}" has been successfully deleted.

PhasesManager.cardDescription: Manage the phases and their associated PEP elements.
PhasesManager.deleteDialogDescription: This action cannot be undone. It will permanently delete the phase "{name}". This action will fail if the phase is assigned to any crew.

toast.validationErrorDescription: The phase name and PEP element cannot be empty.
toast.phaseDeletedDescription: The phase "{name}" has been successfully deleted.
